label: FAIL
rationale: The ACE table maps column 0x03 to BooleanExpr and 0x04 to Columns, and Opal defines ACE_Locking_RangeNNNN_Get_RangeStartToActiveKey with BooleanExpr Admins and the full RangeStart through ActiveKey column set. A successful Get returning BooleanExpr Anybody for the Range2 instance contradicts that ACE row definition; if the optional row were absent, SUCCESS would also be invalid.

label: FAIL
rationale: Opal defines ACE_Locking_RangeNNNN_Get_RangeStartToActiveKey with Columns RangeStart, RangeLength, ReadLockEnabled, WriteLockEnabled, ReadLocked, WriteLocked, LockOnReset, and ActiveKey. A successful Get for the Range8 instance that omits ActiveKey from column 0x04 does not match the documented ACE row; if the optional row were absent, SUCCESS would also be invalid.

label: FAIL
rationale: Opal defines ACE_Locking_RangeNNNN_Set_RdLocked with BooleanExpr Admins and Columns ReadLocked. A successful Get for the Range2 Set_RdLocked ACE returning Columns WriteLocked reads as the wrong sibling ACE and is not protocol-compliant; if the optional row were absent, SUCCESS would also be invalid.

label: FAIL
rationale: Opal defines ACE_Locking_RangeNNNN_Set_WrLocked with BooleanExpr Admins and Columns WriteLocked. A successful Get for the Range8 Set_WrLocked ACE returning Columns ReadLocked reads as the wrong sibling ACE and is not protocol-compliant; if the optional row were absent, SUCCESS would also be invalid.

label: FAIL
rationale: Opal defines ACE_K_AES_128_RangeNNNN_GenKey with BooleanExpr Admins and Columns All. A successful Get for ACE_K_AES_128_Range2_GenKey returning BooleanExpr Anybody contradicts the documented ACE row; if the optional row were absent, SUCCESS would also be invalid.

label: FAIL
rationale: Opal defines ACE_K_AES_128_RangeNNNN_GenKey with BooleanExpr Admins and Columns All. A successful Get for ACE_K_AES_128_Range8_GenKey returning Columns Mode instead matches the separate ACE_K_AES_Mode concept rather than the GenKey ACE row, so it is not protocol-compliant; if the optional row were absent, SUCCESS would also be invalid.

label: FAIL
rationale: Opal defines ACE_K_AES_256_RangeNNNN_GenKey with BooleanExpr Admins and Columns All. A successful Get for ACE_K_AES_256_Range8_GenKey returning Columns Key reports a K_AES table data column rather than the ACE row's Columns value, so it is not protocol-compliant; if the optional row were absent, SUCCESS would also be invalid.
